        Executive watch (CxO)

        LinkedIn does not permit automated feed access, so live CxO posts can't be pulled in. These are direct profile/source links plus any public commentary surfaced via news search on each refresh.
        Auto-maintained by a twice-daily scheduled task (web research + direction re-assessment). Sell-likelihood figures are subjective analyst estimates, not data.
        Not investment advice. Single-stock biotech is high risk — you can lose your entire stake.
